languages.text: "Видите, наследни{mf|к|ца}? Мне не требуется добиваться подчинения от подручных. Люди повинуются моим приказам, потому что таков естественный порядок вещей. Вам же до этого далеко".

traits.locale_text: "Видите, наследни{mf|к|ца}? Мне не требуется добиваться подчинения от подручных. Люди повинуются моим приказам, потому что таков естественный порядок вещей. Вам же до этого далеко".
traits.speaker: DLC3_DL_SeberianVonValancius

languages.text: "Do you see, my heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural way of things. You, however, are a long way from that."
languages.original_text: "Видите, наследни{mf|к|ца}? Мне не требуется добиваться подчинения от подручных. Люди повинуются моим приказам, потому что таков естественный порядок вещей. Вам же до этого далеко".

traits.locale_text: "Do you see, heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural order of things. You are far from achieving that."
"Do you see, heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural way of things. You, however, are a long way from that."
"Do you see, heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural way of things. You, however, are a long way from that."
"Do you see, my heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural way of things. You, however, are a long way from that."

languages.text: «¿Se da cuenta, {mf|heredero mío|heredera mía}? Yo no necesito exigir la obediencia de mis subalternos. La gente obedece mis órdenes porque es lo natural. A usted le queda mucho para llegar a eso».
languages.original_text: "Do you see, my heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural way of things. You, however, are a long way from that."

traits.locale_text: «¿Se da cuenta, {mf|heredero mío|heredera mía}? Yo no necesito exigir la obediencia de mis subalternos. La gente obedece mis órdenes porque es lo natural. A usted le queda mucho para llegar a eso».

languages.text: “看到了吗，我的继承人？我根本无需强求下属服从。人们听从我的命令，因为这本就是理所当然之事。而你，离做到这点还差得远呢。”
languages.original_text: "Do you see, my heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural way of things. You, however, are a long way from that."

traits.locale_text: “看到了吗，我的继承人？我根本无需强求下属服从。人们听从我的命令，因为这本就是理所当然之事。而你，离做到这点还差得远呢。”

languages.text: « Vous voyez, {mf|héritier|héritière} ? Nul besoin d'imposer l'obéissance à mes subalternes. Les gens suivent mes ordres parce que c'est dans l'ordre des choses. Vous, en revanche, vous ne pouvez pas en dire autant. »
languages.original_text: "Do you see, my heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural way of things. You, however, are a long way from that."

traits.locale_text: « Vous voyez, {mf|héritier|héritière} ? Nul besoin d'imposer l'obéissance à mes subalternes. Les gens suivent mes ordres parce que c'est dans l'ordre des choses. Vous, en revanche, vous ne pouvez pas en dire autant. »

languages.text: "Görüyor musun vârisim? Astlardan itaat talep etmeme gerek yok. İnsanlar emirlerime uyuyor çünkü eşyanın tabiatı bunu gerektiriyor. Gelgelelim sen bundan çok uzaksın."
languages.original_text: "Do you see, my heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural way of things. You, however, are a long way from that."

traits.locale_text: "Görüyor musun vârisim? Astlardan itaat talep etmeme gerek yok. İnsanlar emirlerime uyuyor çünkü eşyanın tabiatı bunu gerektiriyor. Gelgelelim sen bundan çok uzaksın."

languages.text: 「見ぬか、私の後継者よ。下々の従順を要求する必要はない。自然の摂理に従って、人は私の命令に従う。だが、お前はそれに遠く及ばぬ。」
languages.original_text: "Do you see, my heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural way of things. You, however, are a long way from that."

traits.locale_text: 「見ぬか、私の後継者よ。下々の従順を要求する必要はない。自然の摂理に従って、人は私の命令に従う。だが、お前はそれに遠く及ばぬ。」

languages.text: "Seht Ihr, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}? Ich muss von Untergebenen keinen Gehorsam einfordern. Die Leute befolgen meine Befehle, weil das die natürliche Ordnung der Dinge ist. Davon seid Ihr weit entfernt."
languages.original_text: "Do you see, heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural order of things. You are far from achieving that."

traits.locale_text: "Seht Ihr, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}? Ich muss von Untergebenen keinen Gehorsam einfordern. Die Leute befolgen meine Befehle, weil das die natürliche Ordnung der Dinge ist. Davon seid Ihr weit entfernt."
